positive: A high-contrast, symmetrical illustration of bioluminescent celestial flora. Depict exotic, stylized flowers and twisting cosmic vines emanating from a central point, surrounded by nebulae patterns and glowing constellations. The style should be a combination of Art Deco aesthetics and ethereal stained-glass quality, using deep midnight blues, vibrant magenta, electric cyan, and shimmering gold accents. The composition must be perfectly balanced and circular, ensuring clean silhouettes suitable for apparel printing. The overall mood is mystical, magical, and deeply ornamental. Vector art style, isolated on a solid background.
